Video.summary: A group of wagons begins to run out of food and water after becoming trapped in a hot desert.
Video.title: How Death Valley Got Its Name

Image.alt: How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name

Video.summary: Mamie Jaggers is one of the only single women in the mining town of Bullfrog, Nevada.
Video.title: The Little Bullfrog Nugget

Video.summary: A butterfly collector comes to Death Valley and not only finds moths but discovers his true love.
Video.title: The Chivaree

Video.summary: Mary Helen Crosby conceals government papers in her umbrella to insure their safe arrival.
Video.title: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Image.alt: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Video.summary: A young man must prove his identity in order to marry the white girl he loves.
Video.title: Swamper Ike

Video.summary: Claim jumper Jennie attempts to jump the mining claim of Buck Hansen near Rhyolite, Nevada.
Video.title: Claim Jumpin' Jennie

Video.summary: Two men must find a way to stake a claim without going to jail.
Video.title: The Bandits of Panamint

Video.summary: A society belle finds herself living in Carson City, Nev., known as Little Washington.
Video.title: Little Washington

Video.summary: The town drunk Solomon asks the current newspaper owner to aid in his tall tales to his sister.
Video.title: Solomon in All His Glory

Video.summary: A territorial dispute threatens the border town of Aurora and a young couple's love.
Video.title: Which Side of the Fence?

Video.summary: Cavalry man Larry Brooks is escorting a group through peaceful Native territory when threats arise.
Video.title: One in a Hundred

Video.summary: The discovery of a nugget weighing 12 pounds causes an uproar in a California gold town.
Video.title: The Twelve Pound Nugget

Video.summary: Jimmy Dayton hopes to win the hand of a gold-digging dance girl.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Treasure

Video.summary: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with ways to make it happen.
Video.title: Snowshoe Thompson

Video.summary: An engineer negotiates a peace treaty with Natives refusing to let a railroad cross their lands.
Video.title: Husband Pro-Tem

Video.summary: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.
Video.title: The Kickapoo Run

Video.summary: Lucretia's family endures years of poverty because her daydreaming husband hates steady work.
Video.title: The Rainbow Chaser

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: A tenderfoot becomes a swamper with the Big Team to prove his worth to the girl he loves.
Video.title: The Big Team Rolls

Video.summary: Depositing his gold in San Francisco, a prospector encounters the temptations of the big city.
Video.title: Riggs and Riggs

Video.summary: Wagon train members oppose their leader's desire to observe Sunday as a day of rest.
Video.title: The Seventh Day

Video.summary: A crystal ball sends the seventh daughter of a seventh daughter West to seek her fortune.
Video.title: The Crystal Gazer

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: A miner turned lawyer falls in love.
Video.title: Whirlwind Courtship

Video.summary: The romance of young lovers is threatened by their feuding families.
Video.title: Halfway Girl

Video.summary: The tumultuous life of Lola Montez, a dancer who goes through fame and several fortunes.
Video.title: Lola Montez

Video.summary: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.
Video.title: The Informer Who Cried

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: Wagonmaster Lassen faces an unruly mob when he tries a new route to California in the 1840s.
Video.title: The Other Side of the Mountain

Image.alt: The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain

Video.summary: A settler must prove an inheritance.
Video.title: The Pieces of the Puzzle

Video.summary: John Slaughter's deputy poses a problem: the maverick is prone to violence and accepting bribes.
Video.title: A Shortcut Through Tombstone

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: Lumberjack Will is attracted to the spoiled daughter of his boss, Mr. Bell.
Video.title: The Taming of Trudy Bell

Video.summary: There's more than gold in store for prim Wilhelmina Vail when she tackles a claim in Utah territory.
Video.title: Talk to Me, Charley

Video.summary: Father de la Cuesta is curious why a deceased padre ordered a hand organ for the mission.
Video.title: A Gift from Father Tapis

Video.summary: A land manager tries to outfox two women attempting to rightfully claim their property.
Video.title: By the Book

Video.summary: Gold fever takes hold when Nellie learns that nuggets just lay on the ground in a remote area.
Video.title: The Angel of Tombstone

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Image.alt: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull
